copy.heroHeadline: Restorative dentistry with a calm, patient-first experience in Lakewood.
copy.heroSubheadline: From preventive visits and cosmetic care to TMJ support and emergency treatment, our team helps East Dallas patients feel informed, comfortable, and cared for.
copy.aboutSnippet: Dr. Ben Alexander and the Lakewood Restorative Dentistry team combine advanced clinical training with personal, relationship-based care for every visit.
